Qwen3.6-27B-Q3_K_M.notes: 27B Q3_K_M variant for a slightly higher-quality option within the Qwen3.6 GGUF set.

Qwen3.6-27B-Q3_K_S.notes: 27B Q3_K_S variant for a smaller, faster long-context option within the Qwen3.6 GGUF set.

Qwen3.6-27B-UD-IQ2_M.notes: 27B UD IQ2_M variant for testing lower-VRAM long-context behavior on TurboQuant.

Qwen3.6-27B-UD-IQ2_XXS.notes: 27B UD IQ2_XXS variant for testing the smallest practical long-context 27B option on TurboQuant.

Qwen3.6-27B-MTP-Q3_K_S.notes: 27B MTP Q3_K_S variant for highest-quality MTP attempts that may still fit only at shorter contexts on 16 GiB GPUs.

Qwen3.6-27B-MTP-UD-IQ2_M.notes: 27B MTP UD IQ2_M variant selected as the main 16 GiB long-context MTP candidate.

Qwen3.6-27B-MTP-UD-IQ2_XXS.notes: 27B MTP UD IQ2_XXS fallback for VRAM-constrained 100K-130K context experiments.

Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-IQ3_S.notes: 35B A3B UD IQ3_S variant for good balance with high quality and speed within the new Qwen3.6 GGUF set.

Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q3_K_S.notes: 35B A3B UD Q3_K_S variant for good balance with high quality and speed within the new Qwen3.6 GGUF set.
